title: Acronia tryssa
taxonomy: Acronia tryssa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to Borneo and is part of the Acronia genus. It belongs to the order Gentianales and the class Magnoliopsida. Within the kingdom Plantae, Acronia tryssa is classified as an angiosperm and a dicotyledon. Its classification as a plant species is further supported by its unique characteristics and morphological features.
